seeds.value: Multi-factor dynamic pricing: base rate from comps, demand multiplier from booking pace, gap-night discounts for orphan dates, seasonal adjustment by market type, last-minute progressive discounts within 7 days.
seeds.description: Core pricing methodology used for rate recommendations

seeds.value: 7 days out: 5% discount. 3 days out: 15% discount. Same day: 25% discount. Never below floor price (60% of base rate).
seeds.description: Progressive discount schedule for unbooked nights approaching check-in
